message: okay so it's happening - jalapeño corn dog bites goes live in like two minutes and i just want to say... we actually nailed this one.
We did - and I'm genuinely surprised how much better it got when I stopped trying to justify every choice.
That's the thing though - Margaret kept telling us that all week and I kept fighting it, which is embarrassing in retrospect.
You kept testing though - that's literally what made the copy work so well, actually.
You tested because the work mattered - that's not embarrassing, that's the only reason to do it at all.
It's live. Go home. We did good work this week.
